scripts.dev:electron: npm run build -w electron && npm run dev -w electron
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run build:backend" "npm run build:frontend" "npm run build:electron"
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w electron
scripts.package:dir: npm run build && npm run package:dir -w electron
